name: Streaming Claims Pipeline
description: True streaming pipeline for insurance claims processing with watermarks, triggers, late data handling, and accumulating mode. Reads from Pub/Sub, aggregates by coverage type in hourly windows, writes to BigQuery.

parameters.name: output_project
parameters.label: Output GCP Project
parameters.helpText: GCP project ID for BigQuery output tables

parameters.name: output_dataset
parameters.label: Output BigQuery Dataset
parameters.helpText: BigQuery dataset for output tables (default: claims_analytics)

parameters.name: window_size_seconds
parameters.label: Window Size (seconds)
parameters.helpText: Fixed window size in seconds (default: 3600 = 1 hour)

parameters.name: allowed_lateness_seconds
parameters.label: Allowed Lateness (seconds)
parameters.helpText: How long after watermark to accept late data (default: 3600 = 1 hour)
